/CAL:TO CLARIFY SENTENCE/CTORD:AN AMENDEDED ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT BE FILEDIN THIS MATTER  REFLECTING A THREE YEAR STATE PRISON FOR A VIOLATION OF 11370,1 HS/DEF:SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 597 DAYS, PLUS 596 SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 1193 DAYS/4019HALF/CTORD:DEFENDANT BE RELEASED IMMEDIATELY, AND NOT RETURNED TO THE CUSTODY OF CDCR, AS HE HAS COMPLETED HIS TERM OFIMPRISONMENT IN THIS MATTER/DEF:MUST REPORT TO PAROLE UPON HIS RELEASE/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO CORRECT STATE PRISON COMMITMENT RE CREDITS/DAWT/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENSE MOTION TO CORRECT STATE PRISON COMMITMENT FORM RE LOCAL CONDUCT CREDITS FROM 2933,1 TO 4019 IS GRANTED/

/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO CORRECT CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENSE MOTION TO CORRECT CTS ON THE STATE PRISON SENTENCE TAKEN ON 04-19-2013 IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 290 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 290 SAGE  FOR A TOTAL OF 580 DAYS/

/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:SP 3Y: M/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 285 DAYS COUNTY JAIL,  142 DAYS  SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 427 DAYS,/STATES/DNACOMP/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:280/PAR/CDC/PSR/BKFEE/LFNEW/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/
